name: Apricot Balls with Wheat Germ
recipeInstructions:
1. Place dried apricots, 1/2 cup walnuts, and coconut through food grinder.
2. Add wheat germ and orange juice to the mixture.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly combined.
4. Form the mixture into 1-inch balls.
5. Roll each ball in chopped walnuts.
6. Refrigerate until chilled.
makes 24
